metadata.title: AI Baby Image Generator — Turn Any Photo Into 8 Adorable Styles
metadata.description: Upload a photo or write a prompt to generate AI baby images in 8 artistic styles — then bring them to life with BabyBoogey's dance video generator.

hero.title: AI Baby Image Generator — 8 Styles, One Click
hero.description: Turn any baby photo into a 3D-animation portrait, watercolor storybook scene, chibi sticker, plush doll, and more. Then send your favorite into our dance video generator with one tap.

showcase.title: 8 Artistic Styles, Every Baby
showcase.description: Pick from eight hand-tuned styles, each designed to keep your baby's features recognizable while adding a unique artistic flair.

items.title: 3D Animation Studio
items.description: Big eyes, cinematic lighting, and feature-film polish — the style that made 3D animated characters a global favorite.

image.alt: Smiling baby boy reimagined as a Pixar-style 3D animated character by the AI baby photo generator

items.title: Hand-drawn Fantasy
items.description: Soft watercolor washes and whimsical storybook composition — perfect for nursery prints and keepsakes.

image.alt: Baby turned into a hand-drawn fantasy watercolor illustration among meadow flowers by the AI baby photo generator

items.title: Classic Anime
items.description: Bold line art and vibrant cel shading for that instantly recognizable anime protagonist feel.

image.alt: Baby transformed into a classic Japanese anime character with sparkling big eyes by the AI baby generator

items.title: Clay Sculpt
items.description: Stop-motion claymation with visible sculpt marks — handmade warmth your relatives will adore.

image.alt: Baby recreated as a stop-motion claymation sculpted character in a miniature nursery diorama

items.title: Chibi Cute
items.description: Super-deformed chibi proportions, blush cheeks, sticker-ready composition. Irresistibly shareable.

image.alt: Baby styled as a cute chibi kawaii sticker character on a pastel pink background by the AI baby photo generator

items.title: Watercolor
items.description: Delicate brush strokes on textured paper — gentle enough for baby books and invitation cards.

image.alt: Baby rendered as a soft watercolor storybook illustration on textured paper by the AI baby photo generator

items.title: Plush Doll
items.description: Fabric texture, stitched seams, button eyes — the plush toy version of your little one.

image.alt: Baby reimagined as a handmade plush doll with button eyes and stitched seams by the AI baby generator

items.title: Pixel Art
items.description: Retro 16-bit pixel art for gamer parents. A nostalgic nod to SNES-era charm.

image.alt: Baby recreated in retro 16-bit pixel art style under a starry night sky by the AI baby photo generator

usage.title: How It Works
usage.description: From upload to dance video in three steps.

items.title: Step 1: Upload a photo or write a prompt
items.description: Drag a clear baby photo into the generator, or just describe the baby you want. Both modes work — combine them for extra control.

items.title: Step 2: Pick a style
items.description: Eight styles, one click. Every style is tuned to keep facial features recognizable when a reference photo is provided.

items.title: Step 3: Generate and share
items.description: Download the image, or hit 'Make them dance' to send the result straight into our dance video generator — no re-upload needed.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before generating your first AI baby image.

items.question: How similar will the AI baby image look to my real photo?
items.answer: When you upload a clear, front-facing photo, the generator preserves key facial features — eye shape, skin tone, expression — while restyling the art. Good lighting and a high-resolution photo produce the best likeness.

items.question: How many credits does one image cost?
items.answer: 40 credits per image. First-time visitors get a free trial credit grant on sign-up so you can try it before committing.

items.question: Which model powers the generator?
items.answer: We use Nano Banana Pro, Google's Gemini-based image model tuned for strong identity preservation across styles.

items.question: Can I use the image for personal or commercial purposes?
items.answer: Images you generate are yours to use for personal keepsakes, social sharing, and most commercial purposes. Please review our Terms of Service for specifics on content restrictions and eligibility.

items.question: Is my uploaded photo stored somewhere?
items.answer: Uploads are stored in encrypted object storage and never shared with third parties. You can delete any uploaded image from your activity page at any time.

items.question: How do I turn my baby image into a dance video?
items.answer: Once the image is generated, tap 'Make them dance →'. We'll pre-load that image into the dance video generator so you can pick a template and export your video immediately.

cta.title: Ready to Meet Your AI Baby?
cta.description: Generate your first image in 8 styles and turn your favorite into a dance video in minutes.
